MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAMION ROBINSON, Esq. of Diamond McCarthy LLP (Tel: 424-278-2335) as movant/counsel-of-record for Receiver Mark Dottore;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO RECEIVER MARK DOTTORE.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

Matter discussed.

The Court rules as follows: Motion for withdrawal of attorney of record as to Receiver Mark Dottore is granted.

Movant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order using the mandatory Judicial Council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Mar-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF 1130 MARKET LLC's APPLICATION FOR 1) RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER 2)Order for issuance of writ of attachment.

Off calendar. Plaintiff is enjoined from proceeding further in this action based upon section 10 of the order appointing receiver issued by the United States District Court, Northern District of Ohio, Eastern Division, Judge Polster presiding. In addition, any future motions in the instant action shall be calendared in department 501 as that department handles all breach of lease matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
